mapper.select: select id, request_id, holder_id, card_product_id, quantity, status, yeevcc_order_no, card_id, fail_reason, remark, created_at, updated_at from vcc_card_issue_item where id = #{id} and del_flag = '0'

select id, request_id, holder_id, card_product_id, quantity, status, yeevcc_order_no, card_id, fail_reason, remark, created_at, updated_at from vcc_card_issue_item where request_id = #{requestId} and del_flag = '0' order by id asc
mapper.insert:
insert into vcc_card_issue_item ( request_id, holder_id, card_product_id, quantity, status, del_flag, created_at, updated_at ) values
(#{item.requestId}, #{item.holderId}, #{item.cardProductId}, #{item.quantity}, #{item.status}, '0', sysdate(), sysdate())
